mapper.sql: p.id, p.name, p.product_type, p.study_card_id, p.image_url, p.required_points, p.stock_count, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.deleted, sc.title AS study_card_title
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM edu_points_product p LEFT JOIN edu_study_card sc ON p.study_card_id = sc.id AND sc.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND p.status = #{status}
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM edu_points_product p LEFT JOIN edu_study_card sc ON p.study_card_id = sc.id AND sc.deleted = 0 WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_points_product (name, product_type, study_card_id, image_url, required_points, stock_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{productType}, #{studyCardId}, #{imageUrl}, #{requiredPoints}, #{stockCount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_points_product SET name = #{name}, product_type = #{productType}, study_card_id = #{studyCardId}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, required_points = #{requiredPoints}, stock_count = #{stockCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_points_product SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_points_product SET stock_count = stock_count - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND stock_count > 0
UPDATE edu_points_product SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
